pr.title: Phase 8: Omnichannel IM + Email + AI Assist (DDD/TDD)
pr.body: ## Summary Phase 8: Omnichannel IM + Email + AI Assist (DDD/TDD) **New IM Bounded Context** with 3 aggregates (IMChannel, IMSession, IMMessage), 7 TDD test cases, and full Clean Architecture stack: - Domain: 6 channel types, session status machine (waiting→active→transferred→closed), agent concurrency limit enforcement - Application: IM routing, WebSocket hub (placeholder), email inbound parser, AI assist with pluggable LLM (StubProvider) - Infrastructure: 3 MySQL repos, StubProvider LLM - HTTP: 17 new API endpoints across 5 handlers **Key design decisions:** - Widget (`/widget/*`) and email inbound (`/email/inbound`) routes are **public** (outside JWT auth group) since visitors and webhook providers don't have tokens - AI assist uses `LLMProvider` interface — StubProvider now, Aliyun Tongyi in Phase 9 - Agent max chat slots enforced in both AssignAgent and TransferSession **Bug fixes from Devin Review:** - Moved widget/email routes outside JWT-protected group - Added empty email Subject+Body validation to prevent orphaned sessions ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Verify widget/email public routes don't need any auth mechanism (API key, webhook signature, etc.) for production — currently fully open - [ ] Review IM session status transitions match business requirements (waiting→active→transferred→closed) - [ ] Verify agent concurrency limit (default 5 max chat slots) is appropriate for your use case - [ ] Check IMChannel `config` field (stored as JSON string) structure meets integration needs for each channel type - [ ] Test email inbound webhook with actual email provider payload format (SendGrid/Mailgun) **Recommended test plan:** 1. Create an IM channel via `POST /api/v1/im-channels` 2. Create a visitor session via `POST /api/v1/widget/sessions` (no auth needed) 3. Send messages back and forth via widget and im-session endpoints 4. Test transfer and close operations 5. Test AI assist endpoints (correct/expand/optimize) 6. Send a test email inbound webhook to `POST /api/v1/email/inbound` ### Notes - 129 total tests (7 new IM domain tests + 122 existing), all passing with `-race` - WebSocket upgrade is a structural placeholder (`ServeWS` returns 426) — actual gorilla/websocket integration deferred to frontend phase - Merge conflict with main (from PR #9 Phase 7) resolved in this PR Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99 Requested by: @divord97 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
